subcodes.title: Words to Horace Holley, spoken on 1913-05-11
subcodes.first_line: In the spiritual mirror, the virtues of the world of humanity are visible. Just as the intellectual law unravels the mysteries of phenomena
subcodes.first_line_orig: در آئینهٴ ثانی انوار فضائل و کمالات عالم انسانی جلوه نماید و چنانکه در عالم طبیعت
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transcending the material condition, @soul; spirit after death, @Word of God sanctified from time and place, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom
